hook_en: Let's squeeze some truth about lemonades!
key_message: Homemade lemonade with real ingredients is healthier than commercial options filled with additives and no real lemon juice.
visual_elements: close-up of fresh lemons being squeezed
pouring raw honey into a glass
bottle of commercial lemonade with ingredients list visible
side-by-side comparison of homemade and commercial lemonade
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade lemonade (lemons, water, raw honey) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial lemonade (HFCS, citric acid, yellow 5) — Commercial lemonade often contains zero actual lemon juice

hook_en: Real lemons or just yellow 5? Let's find out!
key_message: Commercial lemonades can be misleading; they often contain artificial additives instead of real lemons.
visual_elements: label close-up of commercial lemonade showing 'yellow 5'
quick ingredient list pop-up with visuals (lemons vs. additives)
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade lemonade (lemons, water, raw honey) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial lemonade (HFCS, citric acid, yellow 5) — Commercial lemonade often contains zero actual lemon juice
